category_sources: source_facts.description says Linux key management utilities; kernel.org repository is the upstream keyutils project.
display_name_sources: source_facts.name is keyutils; source_facts.homepage is the upstream keyutils repository path.
docs_sources: Official kernel.org source tree provides README documentation; no separate dedicated docs domain was identified.
repo_sources: source_facts.repo is empty; source_facts.homepage and source_facts.source-archive both point to the official kernel.org keyutils git repository.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and executables keyctl/request-key identify Linux key management utilities for kernel keyrings.
